'''Yin Metal Ox''' is the 38th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 辛 Kanoto (yin metal, the luna-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 丑 Ushi, the [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's earth generates the stem's metal, feeding the heavens from below.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Metal Rat]] (node 37) and [[Yang Water Tiger]] (node 39).

== Folk reading ==
Yin Metal Ox is the '''bound-treaty year''': under it, defeated polities have signed humiliating settlements drafted by stronger neighbors, and chronicles file them under a single shared epithet.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoto (辛)]] — yin metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] — yin earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Metal Rat]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Water Tiger]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904956}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
